ItacAcademyItem.Name: Perseveranti (Accademia dei)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: According to Tiraboschi, Giulio Tassoni wrote the following text for the Accademia dei Perseveranti: Iulii Tassoni Vineolensis philosophi Microcosmographia, seu parvi mundi brevis descriptio iuxta tres scientias philosophiam, medicinam, et sacram theologiam... (Bononiae, apud Io. Rossium, 1588).
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
